## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and collaboration improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team changes: New team members introduced (Vivek, Timmy, Mara)](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Content production: 16 articles staged in CMS last week, integration page FAQs being updated](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [LLM visibility: Focus on brand strength, engagement time, and impressions for AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: Exploring automation for publishing content directly to Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

## Topics

### Team Introduction and Roles

  - [Vivek: Managing Editor, overseeing technical accounts and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Timmy: Content Manager, experienced in generating articles for technical accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Mara: Director (currently out of office), manages overall account success](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Content Updates and Performance

  - [16 articles staged in CMS last week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Integration page FAQs being updated, expected completion this week](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Duplicate content opportunities and pages to refresh listed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Stable week in terms of performance: clicks rose, CTRs fell slightly, average positions unchanged](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### LLM Visibility and Tracking

  - [LLM referral to be broken out on a separate page in the new Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Basic SEO principles (80% of results) still highly effective for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Brand strength crucial: engagement time, mentions in high-authority publications, and share of voice](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Impressions gaining importance due to AI overviews in Google search results](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Content Production Best Practices

  - [Balance between volume, speed, and depth of content](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [In-depth articles tailored to ICP perform best](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [More data from Strapi (ICP, sales calls, customer success, community discussions) helps create targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/ypkvC2bN9Qz-rci2EqbdcR_MSCvgxdLe?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
